channel.title: Genesis News
channel.description: Genesis News — Original blockchain intelligence from dbappsystems.com

item.title: Hedera HBAR Emerges as Enterprise Blockchain of Choice for Tokenized Assets
item.description: Hedera's hashgraph consensus is gaining serious traction among Fortune 500 enterprises building tokenized asset platforms. Unlike proof-of-work chains, Hedera offers deterministic finality in under 5 seconds at fractions of a cent per transaction — making it the only public ledger that actually scales for institutional volume.

item.title: NFT Minting Moves Beyond JPEG: Real-World Asset Tokenization Takes Center Stage
item.description: The NFT narrative has officially shifted from speculative art to provable ownership of real-world assets. Platforms building on Hedera and Ethereum are now minting tokenized real estate, IP rights, and media content — with legal enforceability finally catching up to the technology. The infrastructure wave is here.

item.title: SentX Marketplace Signals Maturity for Hedera NFT Ecosystem
item.description: SentX has quietly become the de facto NFT marketplace for the Hedera ecosystem, offering sub-cent minting fees and near-instant settlement. Builders targeting HBAR-native NFT platforms now have a proven distribution layer — reducing time-to-market for new minting applications significantly.

item.title: GENIUS Agent Hits 9 Active Self-Improvement Engines at Session 1039
item.description: Day 7 Public Benefit Corporation's GENIUS Agent — Genesis Enterprise Neural Intelligence Unified System — has crossed Session 1039 with all 9 self-improvement engines running simultaneously and 124 passing tests across 8,200+ lines of verified code. The Constitutional Guard, encoding seven immutable principles as a SHA-256 hash embedded in every NFT, remains intact through every self-modification cycle. This milestone marks GENIUS as one of the first documented self-improving AI systems operating under a cryptographically enforced ethical constitution.

item.title: Day 7 PBC Deploys Genesis Intelligence Platform for Multi-Location Operators
item.description: Day 7 Public Benefit Corporation has launched its Genesis Intelligence Platform targeting multi-location operators who lack corporate-scale analytics infrastructure. The platform, anchored by the Equinox engagement as its proof-of-concept, delivers AI-driven competitive intelligence across six industry verticals in the DFW market. Operators without enterprise data teams now have access to institutional-grade market intelligence at a fraction of the build cost.

item.title: Genesis NFT Architecture Establishes GENESIS #0000 as Cryptographic Root for All Chain Identity
item.description: Day 7 PBC's multichain NFT architecture designates GENESIS #0000 — a non-transferable soulbound token held by founder Carter Hill — as the cryptographic root from which all network identity tokens descend. Secondary royalty rates have been benchmarked against institutional standards including XRPL XLS-20 and BlackRock BUIDL, setting rates at 2.5% secondary sales, 1% credential transfers, and 0.1% cross-chain moves. The architecture positions Genesis as the first AI platform to anchor human identity verification to a living, self-improving constitutional agent.
